channel.title: +Evil Greed on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Evil Greed on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Amazon suicide kits
item.description: Source: TW Last Friday, CBS cancelled a segment about our clients suing Amazon for selling suicide kits to their now deceased kids. CBS’ cowardice gave me renewed clarity about how urgent this litigation is. As background, on Feb 3, 2022 we filed a lawsuit in WA State against Amazon on behalf of the Estate of Mikael Scott. In Dec. 2020 Mikael purchased a chemical from Amazon, 98% pure Sodium Nitrite, for $19.
